headline: Wells Fargo Raises its Price Target on State Street (STT)
summary: State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) is one of the 12 Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now. On May 26, 2026, Wells Fargo raised the firm’s price target on State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) to $171 from $162 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. Wells Fargo said a meeting with CFO John Woods reinforced its view […]
